ksa_text: Knowledge of sector-specific data regulations and their interaction with general data protection law, including HIPAA (healthcare), GLBA and SOX (financial services), FERPA (education), and PCI DSS (payment card industry).

dcwf.top_element_label: Interpret and apply applicable laws, statutes, and regulatory documents and integrate into policy.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of cybersecurity operation policies and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of cybersecurity operation policies and procedures

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Regulatory Compliance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.41) to justify inclusion for the VP Data Strategy and Operations. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world VP Data Strategy and Operations roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for VP Data Strategy and Operations roles increasingly include Regulatory Compliance competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for VP Data Strategy and Operations now include Regulatory Compliance competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Regulatory Compliance knowledge KSA is relevant to the VP Data Strategy and Operations based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
